widgets_values: High quality realistic video. A quiet alpine lake reflects snow-covered mountains at sunrise. Thin mist drifts above the water, pine trees move gently in the wind, and warm golden light slowly spreads across the peaks. The camera performs a smooth forward glide from the rocky shoreline toward the lake, then rises slightly to reveal the valley. Natural water ripples, soft clouds, cinematic lighting, peaceful travel documentary mood.

nodes.title: Positive Prompt
How This Example Works
widgets_values:
# LTX-2.3 FunPack node set example

This workflow shows the full loop for the current FunPack nodes in an LTX-2.3 two-stage video workflow.

The path is left to right:

1. Load models and LoRAs
2. Encode the prompt and optional first frame
3. Let Video Refiner adjust conditioning, LoRA suggestions, sigmas, and video latent
4. Sample the low-resolution pass
5. Upscale and sample the final pass
6. Decode and save

Use whatever prompt, first frame, LoRAs, and models make sense for your own workflow. The text here is only neutral example content.

nodes.title: LoRA Flow
widgets_values:
# Apply LoRA Weights -> LoRA Loader

FunPack Apply LoRA Weights builds the stack from the visible rows and checks Video Refiner history for this exact prompt and refinement key.

FunPack LoRA Loader applies the stack to the model, then passes the same stack forward so Video Refiner can save better suggestions after you rate a result.

Keep the same refinement key in Apply LoRA Weights, Video Refiner, and Save Refinement Latent.

Do not change the prompt between rating runs if you expect exact prompt suggestions to match.

nodes.title: Video Refiner Flow
widgets_values:
# Video Refiner

Video Refiner receives the positive conditioning, exact prompt text, FunPack LoRA stack, sigmas, and plain video latent.

It can output modified conditioning, refined sigmas, and a refined video latent. It also updates future LoRA weight suggestions from your rating.

Use -Just forget it- when the run failed for reasons the refiner should ignore, such as a bad seed, wrong image, wrong model, or workflow mistake.

Do not connect combined audio/video latents into Video Refiner. Use the separated video latent only, then connect refined_latent back into LTXVConcatAVLatent.

nodes.title: Sampler Flow
widgets_values:
# FunPack Hybrid Euler 2S Sampler

Both sampler nodes output SAMPLER and feed the sampler input on CustomSampler or CustomSamplerAdvanced.

The low-resolution pass uses refined sigmas from Video Refiner. The high-resolution pass keeps the second-stage sampler path clear and visible.

Do not replace these sampler links with sampler name strings. The sampler input should stay connected to the FunPack sampler node.
